DB_TYPE.description: Database engine: postgres, mysql, mssql, or sqlite (default: postgres).

DB_HOST.description: PostgreSQL host. Points at the sibling 'postgres' Railway service in this template.

DB_NAME.description: Database name for Wiki.js data. Must match the postgres service's POSTGRES_DB (/wikijs).

DB_USER.description: Database user. Must match the postgres service's POSTGRES_USER.

DB_PASS.description: Database password. Must match the postgres service's POSTGRES_PASSWORD. Rotate both before production.

DB_FILEPATH.description: Path for SQLite database file when using DB_TYPE=sqlite.

URL_BASE.description: Public URL of your wiki. Auto-populated from Railway's public domain.
